# AARNN Network — Wiki Home — Wiki Home

Infrastructure-as-Code for building, running, and publishing containerised AARNN and Aeron workloads. Uses Terraform to provision the cloud infrastructure needed to run the AARNN neuromorphic platform.

> ☕ [Support NeuralMimicry on Crowdfunder](https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/aWggxwPW?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink)

## Quick start

See `terraform/README.md` for full instructions and a complete variable reference.

```bash
cd terraform/
terraform init
terraform plan
terraform apply
```



## Related

- [aarnn](https://github.com/neuralmimicry/aarnn) — the C++ neuromorphic platform this provisions
- [aarnn_rust](https://github.com/neuralmimicry/aarnn_rust) — Rust neuromorphic platform
